name: UNAIDS Mandate 1994 (Joint UN Programme on HIV/AIDS)
summary: The Joint United Nations Programme on HIV/AIDS (UNAIDS) is a global supranational meta-framework foundational-UNAIDS framework established by the UN Economic and Social Council ECOSOC — structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-HIV-AIDS-response framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal joint-co-sponsored framework with 11 UN co-sponsors framework (UNAIDS established 26 July 1994 by UN ECOSOC Resolution 1994/24 + UN General Assembly Resolution 49/202 of 23 December 1994 + UNAIDS operations began 1 January 1996 — formal foundational UNAIDS framework establishing comprehensive UNAIDS organisation framework, distinct from rest-of-modern-international-treaty frameworks which operate on different substantive areas, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-HIV-AIDS-response framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal joint-co-sponsored framework with 11 UN co-sponsors framework: UNHCR + UNICEF + WFP + UNDP + UNFPA + UNODC + UN Women + ILO + UNESCO + WHO + World Bank framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 95-95-95 Fast-Track Targets 2025 framework via 95% diagnosed + 95% on-treatment + 95% viral-suppression framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Global Fund partnership framework via Global Fund to Fight AIDS Tuberculosis and Malaria 2002 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal PEPFAR partnership framework via US President's Emergency Plan for AIDS Relief 2003 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 1.3 million new HIV infections 2024 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 630,000 AIDS-related deaths 2024 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 39.9 million people living with HIV 2024 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Trump-administration-PEPFAR-cuts 2025 budget-crisis framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 2025-AIDS-still-not-ended framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal UNAIDS 11 UN Co-sponsors framework (UNAIDS framework providing formal 11 UN co-sponsors framework: UNHCR + UNICEF + WFP + UNDP + UNFPA + UNODC + UN Women + ILO + UNESCO + WHO + World Bank framework — formal foundational UNAIDS 11 UN Co-sponsors framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating formal joint-co-sponsored 11 UN co-sponsors framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Programme Coordinating Board PCB framework with 22 member states + 11 UN co-sponsors + 5 civil society organizations framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal UNAIDS 95-95-95 Fast-Track Targets framework (UNAIDS 95-95-95 Fast-Track Targets adopted 2020 by UN High-Level Meeting on HIV/AIDS providing formal 95% diagnosed + 95% on-treatment + 95% viral-suppression by 2025 framework — formal foundational UNAIDS 95-95-95 Fast-Track Targets framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating formal 95-95-95 Fast-Track Targets framework), and as the central jurisdiction of the formal Global Fund + PEPFAR partnership framework (Global Fund to Fight AIDS Tuberculosis and Malaria established 28 January 2002 in Geneva Switzerland + US President's Emergency Plan for AIDS Relief PEPFAR established 28 January 2003 + UNAIDS-Global-Fund-PEPFAR partnership framework — formal foundational UNAIDS-Global-Fund-PEPFAR partnership framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating formal Global-Fund + PEPFAR partnership framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal USD 110+ billion PEPFAR cumulative-funding 2003-2024 framework). The UNAIDS Mandate is operating upon 100+ countries field operations + 39.9 million people living with HIV 2024 framework — comprehensive global HIV/AIDS coverage framework. The Mandate is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label, though formal UNAIDS Children + Adolescents Living with HIV framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal cross-border-children-HIV-disclosure-to-parents framework. The UNAIDS Programme Coordinating Board PCB + UNAIDS Executive Director + UNAIDS Secretariat + UNAIDS Country Offices are the formal UNAIDS bodies; national-level apex courts operate as judicial bodies. The UNAIDS Mandate is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label.

statutory_framework.citation: UNAIDS Founding Resolution 1994 (UN ECOSOC Resolution 1994/24 + UN General Assembly Resolution 49/202)
statutory_framework.title: UNAIDS Founding Resolution
statutory_framework.relevance: UNAIDS established 26 July 1994 by UN ECOSOC Resolution 1994/24 + UN General Assembly Resolution 49/202 of 23 December 1994 — formal foundational UNAIDS framework establishing comprehensive UNAIDS organisation framework.

statutory_framework.citation: UNGASS Declaration of Commitment on HIV/AIDS 2001
statutory_framework.title: UNGASS Declaration of Commitment on HIV/AIDS
statutory_framework.relevance: Declaration of Commitment on HIV/AIDS adopted 27 June 2001 at UN General Assembly Special Session UNGASS — formal foundational UNGASS HIV/AIDS framework.

statutory_framework.title: UNAIDS 95-95-95 Fast-Track Targets
statutory_framework.relevance: UNAIDS 95-95-95 Fast-Track Targets adopted 2020 by UN High-Level Meeting on HIV/AIDS — formal foundational UNAIDS 95-95-95 Fast-Track Targets framework.

statutory_framework.citation: Political Declaration on HIV and AIDS 2021
statutory_framework.title: Political Declaration on HIV and AIDS 2021
statutory_framework.relevance: Political Declaration on HIV and AIDS Ending Inequalities and Getting on Track to End AIDS by 2030 adopted 8 June 2021 at UN High-Level Meeting on HIV/AIDS — formal foundational UNAIDS End AIDS by 2030 framework.

apex_courts.name: UNAIDS Programme Coordinating Board (PCB)
apex_courts.role: Formal supreme decision-making body for UNAIDS — composed of 22 member states + 11 UN co-sponsors + 5 civil society organizations.

apex_courts.name: UNAIDS Executive Director
apex_courts.role: Formal administrative head body for UNAIDS — UNAIDS Executive Director Winnie Byanyima 2019-2025+ framework.

anonymisation_convention: UNAIDS-related communications operate via state-state framework via UN ECOSOC + UNAIDS PCB; individual communications limited under UNAIDS framework + UNAIDS Greater-Involvement-of-People-Living-with-HIV-AIDS GIPA framework operates anonymisation convention.

key_developments.title: AIDS first identified
key_developments.description: AIDS first identified 5 June 1981 in US CDC Morbidity and Mortality Weekly Report MMWR — predecessor framework to UNAIDS.

key_developments.title: HIV first identified
key_developments.description: HIV first identified 1983 by Luc Montagnier + Françoise Barré-Sinoussi at Pasteur Institute + Robert Gallo at NIH — predecessor framework to UNAIDS.

key_developments.title: WHO Global Programme on AIDS GPA
key_developments.description: WHO Global Programme on AIDS GPA established 1 February 1987 — predecessor framework to UNAIDS.

key_developments.title: UNAIDS established
key_developments.description: UNAIDS established 26 July 1994 by UN ECOSOC Resolution 1994/24 + UN General Assembly Resolution 49/202 of 23 December 1994 — formal foundational UNAIDS framework operational.

key_developments.title: UNAIDS operations begin + ART HAART available
key_developments.description: UNAIDS operations began 1 January 1996 + Highly Active Antiretroviral Therapy HAART available 1996 — formal foundational UNAIDS operational framework operational.

key_developments.title: UNGASS Declaration of Commitment on HIV/AIDS
key_developments.description: Declaration of Commitment on HIV/AIDS adopted 27 June 2001 at UN General Assembly Special Session UNGASS — formal foundational UNGASS HIV/AIDS framework operational.

key_developments.title: Global Fund to Fight AIDS Tuberculosis Malaria + PEPFAR 2003
key_developments.description: Global Fund to Fight AIDS Tuberculosis and Malaria established 28 January 2002 in Geneva Switzerland + US PEPFAR established 28 January 2003 — formal foundational Global Fund + PEPFAR framework operational.

key_developments.title: UNAIDS 90-90-90 Fast-Track Targets
key_developments.description: UNAIDS 90-90-90 Fast-Track Targets by 2020 adopted 2014 — formal foundational UNAIDS 90-90-90 Fast-Track Targets framework operational.

key_developments.title: UNAIDS 95-95-95 Fast-Track Targets
key_developments.description: UNAIDS 95-95-95 Fast-Track Targets by 2025 adopted 2020 — formal foundational UNAIDS 95-95-95 Fast-Track Targets framework operational.

key_developments.title: Trump-PEPFAR-cuts + 2025-AIDS-still-not-ended + Cabenuva + Lenacapavir
key_developments.description: Trump-administration-PEPFAR-cuts February 2025 + 2025-AIDS-still-not-ended framework + Cabenuva + Lenacapavir long-acting-injectable PrEP + Lenacapavir twice-yearly approved June 2025 framework — formal Trump-PEPFAR-cuts + 2025-AIDS-still-not-ended + long-acting-injectable-HIV-prevention framework operational.

structural_findings: UNAIDS Mandate operates a supranational global framework — places UNAIDS Mandate in the global supranational-meta-framework cluster.

Only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-HIV-AIDS-response framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal joint-co-sponsored framework with 11 UN co-sponsors framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-HIV-AIDS-response framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal joint-co-sponsored framework with 11 UN co-sponsors framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 95-95-95 Fast-Track Targets 2025 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Global Fund partnership framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal PEPFAR partnership framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 1.3 million new HIV infections 2024 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 630,000 AIDS-related deaths 2024 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 39.9 million people living with HIV 2024 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Trump-administration-PEPFAR-cuts 2025 budget-crisis framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 2025-AIDS-still-not-ended framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal UNAIDS 11 UN Co-sponsors framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating formal joint-co-sponsored 11 UN co-sponsors framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Programme Coordinating Board PCB framework with 22 member states + 11 UN co-sponsors + 5 civil society organizations framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal UNAIDS 95-95-95 Fast-Track Targets framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating formal 95-95-95 Fast-Track Targets framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal Global Fund + PEPFAR partnership framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating formal Global-Fund + PEPFAR partnership framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal USD 110+ billion PEPFAR cumulative-funding 2003-2024 framework.
100+ countries field operations + 39.9 million people living with HIV 2024 framework is structurally distinctive globally — comprehensive global HIV/AIDS coverage framework.

1981 AIDS + 1983 HIV + 1987 WHO GPA + 1994 UNAIDS + 1996 operations + HAART + 2001 UNGASS + 2002 Global Fund + 2003 PEPFAR + 2014 90-90-90 + 2020 95-95-95 + 2021 Political Declaration + 2025 Trump-cuts + Lenacapavir UNAIDS-framework-development sequence is structurally distinctive globally.

UNAIDS Mandate + Founding Resolution + 11 UN Co-sponsors + 95-95-95 Fast-Track Targets + Global Fund + PEPFAR + GIPA Greater-Involvement-of-People-Living-with-HIV-AIDS formal septet framework with limited PA-intersection framework via formal UNAIDS Children + Adolescents Living with HIV cross-border-children-HIV-disclosure-to-parents framework.
editorial_notes: UNAIDS Mandate jurisdiction sidecar — supranational global international-HIV-AIDS-response foundational-UNAIDS meta-framework (UNAIDS Founding Resolution 1994 + UNGASS 2001 + 95-95-95 Fast-Track Targets 2020 + Political Declaration 2021 + 11 UN Co-sponsors + Global Fund 2002 + PEPFAR 2003 + WHO GPA 1987 predecessor + 1981 AIDS first identified + 1983 HIV identified + 1996 HAART + 2014 90-90-90 + 2025 Trump-PEPFAR-cuts + Lenacapavir long-acting-injectable PrEP). Only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-HIV-AIDS-response framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal joint-co-sponsored framework with 11 UN co-sponsors: UNHCR + UNICEF + WFP + UNDP + UNFPA + UNODC + UN Women + ILO + UNESCO + WHO + World Bank + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 95-95-95 Fast-Track Targets 2025 + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Global Fund + PEPFAR partnership + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 1.3 million new HIV infections 2024 + 630,000 AIDS-related deaths 2024 + 39.9 million PLHIV 2024 + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Trump-PEPFAR-cuts 2025 budget-crisis + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 2025-AIDS-still-not-ended framework + central jurisdiction of formal 11 UN Co-sponsors + PCB 22 member states + 11 UN co-sponsors + 5 civil society organizations + central jurisdiction of formal 95-95-95 Fast-Track Targets + central jurisdiction of formal Global Fund + PEPFAR partnership + USD 110+ billion PEPFAR cumulative 2003-2024 + 100+ countries field operations + UNAIDS Headquartered Geneva + UNAIDS Executive Director Winnie Byanyima 2019-2025 + 1981 AIDS + 1983 HIV + 1987 WHO GPA + 1994 UNAIDS + 1996 operations + HAART + 2001 UNGASS + 2002 Global Fund + 2003 PEPFAR + 2014 90-90-90 + 2020 95-95-95 + 2021 Political Declaration + 2025 Trump-cuts + Lenacapavir UNAIDS-framework-development sequence.

PA-recognition: silent statutory + no-apex-position + silent regulator. NOTE: UNAIDS Children + Adolescents Living with HIV framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal cross-border-children-HIV-disclosure-to-parents framework.
